name: Flash Axe
description: A slashing elbow attack. It's easy to use in combos or as a way of checking your opponent. The medium version can cancel into Prowler Stance when it hits.

name: Flash Chop
description: A lunging swinging attack. It turns the opponent around when it hits an opponent standing on the ground.

name: Aerial Knee Smash
description: Jumps into the air and attacks with the knee. It grants immunity to jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air technique.

name: Power Bomb
description: Grabs the opponent and drive them into the ground. Useful for slipping through an opponent's guard at close range. If this connects when the opponent has their back to you, it transitions into Power Drop.

name: Hyper Bomb
description: A transition attack from Overdrive Power Drop. Effective for attacking the opponent without switching sides.

name: Raging Spear
description: Springs forth with a devastating tackle from a crouching position. This move is invincible on startup, making it useful as a way to turn the tables.

name: Sledgecross Hammer
description: Crushes opponents with a heavy, forward-moving lariat. Produces a wall splat when it connects on an airborne opponent.

name: Omega Wing Buster
description: A transition attack from Overdrive Power Drop. Useful for when you want to maximize your damage output.

name: The Final Prison
description: Chokes out the opponent after hitting them with a Flash Chop. Effective as a close-range reversal, or as a high damage option in combos.

name: Prowler Stance
description: Adopt a very low, stationary fighting stance. While in this stance, each input performs a different technique.

name: Low Rush
description: A movement technique from Prowler Stance that moves Alex forward.

name: Low Retreat
description: A movement technique from Prowler Stance that moves Alex backward.

name: Slashing Elbow
description: Attack the opponent with an elbow strike while moving forward. Launches the opponent on counter hit.

name: Palm Jab
description: A quick attack from Prowler Stance, which can be either rapid canceled, or canceled into a special move.

name: Shoulder Launcher
description: A upward-moving attack from Prowler Stance. Transitions to Falling Moon on counter hit.

name: Heavy Lariat
description: An attack from Prowler Stance that allows you to move before your opponent even when blocked. Hold the button down to gain armor properties. Turns the opponent around on counter hit.

name: Tactical Hop
description: A technique from Prowler Stance that allows you to jump into the air quickly. You're free to attack once you're in the air.

name: Air Stampede
description: An attack from Prowler Stance that quickly brings you back to the ground after jumping up.

name: Sweep Combination
description: A low attack from Prowler Stance. Transitions into Flying Suplex on counter hit.

name: Hyper Takedown
description: An attack from Prowler Stance that performs a double leg takedown on the opponent. Transitions to Death Valley Bomb on Punish Counter.

name: Dangerous Armbar
description: An attack from Prowler Stance that only hits standing opponents. Transitions to Spiral DDT on Punish Counter.

name: Chop
description: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching.

name: Oblique Stomp
description: An attack that allows you to act before an opponent even if blocked. Hit this when your opponent's back is facing towards you to transition into Collapsing Driver.

name: Flying Cross Chop
description: A surprise attack performed while airborne. Useful for surprise attacks or as a way to approach your opponent.

name: Palm Strikes
description: A rapid series of attacks. Can transition into Prowler Stance when it connects.

name: Twisted Drop
description: A counter followed by a sequence of attacks. Can transition into Prowler Stance when it connects.

name: Arm Lock
description: Grab and twist your opponent's arm before throwing them forward. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.

name: Guillotine Hammer
description: Force the opponent off balance before attacking. Throws your opponent while switching places with them.

name: Illegal Knees
description: Strikes the opponent's head with a knee strike. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.

name: Drive Impact: Lariat Kick
description: Lunge forward with a powerful attack. Can be used to absorb an opponent's attack while launching your own offensive.

name: Drive Reversal: Headbutt
description: Can be used after blocking an attack to quickly turn a defensive position into an offensive one. Can also be used when recovering from a knockdown. The input can be held while downed to perform this when rising.

name: Drive Parry
description: Adopt a stance that allows you to deflect all opponent strikes. This stance can be sustained by holding down the command used to activate it.

name: Parry Drive Rush
description: Immediately move forward from a Drive Parry stance. Normal or unique attacks performed while moving will have their properties changed.

name: Cancel Drive Rush
description: Immediately move forward out of an attack. Can be performed during any special-cancelable move.
